function:src/openhuman/agent_meetings/calendar.rs:payload
            .get("summary")
            .or_else(|| payload.get("title"))
            .or_else(|| {
                payload
                    .get("data")
                    .and_then(|d| d.get("summary").or_else(|| d.get("title")))
            })
            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())
            .unwrap_or("Untitled meeting").to_string

            }).take
